full_text:
Lü Kai (Jiping) 呂凱 (季平)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lü Kai (呂凱), styledJiping (季平). Served Shu with Wang Kang. Was Kongming’s guide while battling against the Nanman. Lü Kai was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Lü Kai lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
